title: BadalaMedley
desc: Orchestral Medley of three Angelo Badalamenti's compositions for the tv show Twin Peaks

title: Le Parole Sono Pietre
desc: Documentary film sound. Intimate sonic landscape blending ambient textures with musical cues.

title: Gestare
desc: Horror short by Stella Segar. Visceral bodily sounds create psychological horror exploring bodily autonomy.

title: Re-Creations
desc: Short film sound design. Layered sonic environments crafted to evoke memory and transformation.

title: In The Cards
desc: Suspenseful short exploring fate and choice. Tension built through environmental sounds and crafted silence.

title: Mary La Bone
desc: Gothic-inspired short. Audio evolves from grounded reality to ethereal otherworldliness.

title: The Hand of the Wind
desc: Atmospheric short set in Mustang Valley, Nepal. The wind becomes a character through blended organic and processed sound.

title: Obscure Sorrows — Vemödalen
desc: Sonic narrative from John Koenig's Dictionary of Obscure Sorrows. Field recordings give voice to unnamed emotions.

title: Obscure Sorrows — Rubatosis
desc: An unsettling awareness of your own heartbeat rendered through carefully crafted soundscapes.

title: Obscure Sorrows — Trumspringa
desc: The ache of a life unlived rendered through layered field recordings.

title: Ondine's Theme
desc: Delicate composition inspired by the water nymph. Shimmering textures create an immersive underwater atmosphere.

title: Action!
desc: Cinematic composition exploring tension and release. Rhythmic intensity meets orchestral breadth.

title: Sobhraj
desc: Tense composition using textural elements and rhythmic intensity — a psychological portrait.

title: Tom & Jerry
desc: Playful reinterpretation of cartoon aesthetics. Detailed foley meets contemporary musical techniques.

title: O2
desc: Minimalist composition exploring breath and space. Sparse harmonic textures evolve slowly over time.

title: What a Dream
desc: Dreamy impressionistic composition drawing from surrealist imagery and film score traditions.

title: AmEx
desc: Advertising composition with a sophisticated harmonic palette and polished production aesthetic.

title: evolvingDrone
desc: Evolving drone synthesis engine. Layered harmonics and subtle modulation produce detailed ambient environments.

title: hummingBot
desc: Algorithmic composition tool. Melodic patterns inspired by hummingbird flight translated from movement data.

title: SWAMP
desc: Generative audio environment inspired by wetland ecosystems.

title: VOX POPULI
desc: Voice-driven generative system. Spoken input transformed into evolving harmonic and rhythmic structures.

title: BioSounds
desc: Generative system transforming biological data into evolving soundscapes through custom algorithms.
